title: FulfillmentPolicyResponse

fulfillmentPolicies.description: A list of all of the seller's fulfillment policies defined for the specified marketplace. This array will be returned as empty if no fulfillment policies are defined for the specified marketplace.

href.description: This field is for future use.

limit.description: This field is for future use.

next.description: This field is for future use.

offset.description: This field is for future use.

prev.description: This field is for future use.

total.description:
The total number of fulfillment policies retrieved in the result set.

If no fulfillment policies are defined for the specified marketplace, this field is returned with a value of 0.

description:
The response payload for the getFulfillmentPolicies method.

Note: Pagination has not yet been enabled for getFulfillmentPolicies, so all of the pagination-related fields are for future use.
